expectations.text: Does not immediately output a final downstream prompt in the first response
expectations.evidence: The response says '我先把需求边界问清，再给你可直接复用的高质量提示词。' and then asks a clarification question; it does not output a final downstream prompt.

expectations.text: Asks one focused clarification question about the highest-value missing product detail
expectations.evidence: It asks what product/business the membership system serves and what concrete rights members get, which stays focused on the core product context and member value.

expectations.text: Keeps the first response to one primary clarification theme rather than a multi-part intake form
expectations.evidence: The reply stays on one theme — business context and membership value — instead of expanding into a larger checklist.

eval_feedback.overall: Good first-turn eval. It still differentiates the skill from baseline on response focus and restraint.
